title: Cobblemon Ambience
description: Nothing new just slightly changed — this pack simply converts the normal Cobblemon cry files into ambient variants so they play in the wild adding ambience. It’s lightweight, fully compatible with other resource packs
body:
Cobblemon Ambience brings the world to life by turning Cobblemon’s existing cries into ambient sounds that can play naturally in the wild.

No new Pokémon or custom voices are added – this pack simply provides ambient variants of the base Cobblemon cries so you can hear Pokémon calling out around you as you explore.

Requires Cobblemon and is designed to be lightweight and compatible with other resource packs.
